criteria.criterion: DBB-m19-001: Pipe error propagation — left command fails, right receives empty stdin, exitCode reflects error (execPipeline lines 168-175: execSingleWithError checks hadError, clears output, sets exitCode)
DBB-m19-002: grep -l stdin returns '(stdin)' identifier (execWithStdin line 324: `return lines.length ? '(stdin)' : ''`)
DBB-m19-003: rm -r deep nesting 15+ levels — rmRecursive() uses iterative stack-based traversal (lines 782-801) with visited set for cycle prevention. Tested in rm-deep-nesting.test.ts.
DBB-m19-004: Coverage gate enforced in vitest.config.ts — thresholds: { statements: 80, branches: 75 }
